basicInfo.name: Sung Jinwoo
basicInfo.flavor: Sung Jinwoo was born again as a Necromancer through a Job Change Quest. But because his total finalized points exceeded the required threshold in the settlement calculations afterward, he was able to immediately advance to a second job change as the Shadow Monarch.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Magic Attack.

Skill 1.name: Cheap Shot
Skill 1.desc:
4 Enemies
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 67% of Magic Attack plus 9% of the target's Max HP.

Skill 2.name: Shadow Summon
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 45% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 55% of Magic Attack.

Passive.name: Level Up
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Magic Damage Boost. [Always Active]
 - Self
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 3 Hit(s)]
 - Revives with 80% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - Conqueror of Adversity. [Always Active]
 - Grants Effect Resist Boost. [Always Active]
 - Increases level by 1 upon using a basic attack 2 time(s). [Max Increase: 30 Level(s)]
 - Increases level by 1 upon activating a skill 1 time(s). [Max Increase: 30 Level(s)]
 - Increases level by 2 when an enemy falls in battle. [Max Increase: 30 Level(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Magic Damage Boost to 20%.
 - Increases Effect: HP gained upon revival becomes 100%.
 - Increases Effect: Effect Resist Boost to 49%.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - Self
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - All Allies
 - Adds Effect: All Damage Nullification upon revival. [Ends After: Taking 1 Hit(s)]
 - Self
 - Adds Effect: All Damage Nullification upon revival. [Ends After: Taking 3 Hit(s)]

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.dislikes: People who don't put in the effort, betrayal, overly sweet food
profile.story: Sung Jinwoo was born again as a Necromancer through a Job Change Quest. But because his total finalized points exceeded the required threshold in the settlement calculations afterward, he was able to immediately advance to a second job change as the Shadow Monarch.

basicInfo.name: Sung Jinwoo
basicInfo.flavor: Faced with an endless wave of armored magic beasts, Sung Jinwoo survived by the skin of his teeth, fighting with every ounce of strength he had in him.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Cheap Shot
Skill 1.desc:
4 Enemies
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 52% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Shadow Summon
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Defense-Ignoring damage equal to 42% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 42% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Level Up
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Magic Damage Boost. [Always Active]
 - Self
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 3 Hit(s)]
 - Revives with 60% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - Conqueror of Adversity. [Always Active]
 - Grants Effect Resist Boost. [Always Active]
 - Increases level by 1 upon using a basic attack 2 time(s). [Max Increase: 30 Level(s)]
 - Increases level by 1 upon activating a skill 1 time(s). [Max Increase: 30 Level(s)]
 - Increases level by 2 when an enemy falls in battle. [Max Increase: 30 Level(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: Effect Resist Boost to 31%.

basicInfo.name: Sung Jinwoo
basicInfo.flavor: After being designated the \"Player\" by the System, Sung Jinwoo continued to level up by hunting countless Steel-fanged Lycans in the Hapjeong Station Instance Dungeon.
